rationale: Israeli strikes near Romania's broader neighborhood and Iran deal uncertainty add minor regional tension; Romanian government formation remains the dominant domestic concern.

top_events.title: Romanian government formation — Liberal PM nominee awaiting confidence vote
top_events.summary: Political uncertainty over government formation continues to affect Romania's domestic policy stability and EU fund absorption capacity.

top_events.title: Israeli strikes on Beirut continue; Trump says attacks unjustified, Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Ongoing Beirut strikes and Iran deal uncertainty create mild energy price risk relevant to Romania's import-dependent economy and Black Sea regional stability.

top_events.title: Israel expands military control in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria by 1,000 sq km
top_events.summary: Broader Israeli territorial expansion adds to Middle East instability; indirect relevance for Romania via energy markets and potential refugee flows.
